wordplay_note: Appointed to clear the dark moor — a pilgrim in a death-maze
card_description: Seth Morley (meaning "Seth = appointed; Morley = moor-clearing") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *A Maze of Death*. Colonist on Delmak-O who searches for the Intercessor while reality disintegrates. Name note: Appointed to clear the dark moor — a pilgrim in a death-maze. Religious longing in a designed environment that may be a group hallucination. First appears in *A Maze of Death*.

reference.brief: Colonist on Delmak-O who searches for the Intercessor while reality disintegrates
reference.significance: Religious longing in a designed environment that may be a group hallucination
